product.title: Hydrating CC Cream Foundation with Centella Asiatica Multi-Purpose Pre-makeup Primer Moisturizing Facial Concealer Sunscreen Full-Coverage CC Cream with SPF 25 (02)
featureBullets: 【Color Correcting CC Cream】Available in two shades, a darker shade and a lighter shade, this CC cream is a medium to full coverage color correcting foundation formulated with SPF 25 to protect against sun damage.

【Natural Coverage】CC Cream foundation provides natural and buildable coverage, effectively concealing blemishes, redness, and uneven skin tone while still maintaining a lightweight and non-cakey finish.

【Even Complexion】Full coverage foundation non-greasy, can be absorbed well, Lightweight formula perfectly evens out the skin tone and covers imperfections. Perfect touch of glow without looking too shiny or greasy. Quick invisible concealer returns your exquisite makeup.

【Moisturizing】This cc cream with spf 25 has a lightweight formula infused with moisturizing centella asiatica extract and more.Refreshing on the skin, the Tinted moisturizer for face color changes from white to skin tone, providing a natural look and feel.

【Long-Wearing】The liquid foundation with sunscreen helps cover flaws to create a poreless & semi-matte complexion,creates a natural look for up to 24 hours and keep your natural base makeup for all day long without creasing.
product.description: Feature: 1.The color correcting cc cream is white in color, but once applied, it follows your skin tone precisely, revealing a more even-toned complexion naturally, leaving skin radiant and soft while reducing the appearance of imperfections. 2.Suitable for all skin types, including dry and mature skin. It helps to nourish your skin, leaving it looking and feeling healthy and radiant with a natural finish. 3.Features a creamy formula that glides on smoothly like silk and is easy to blend. 4.Cover skin spots, acne marks, natural and lasting makeup, will not fade, natural and fresh. 5.CC cream contains ingredients such as centella asiatica extract, glycerin, honey extract, which will make your skin feel light and comfortable and look natural. 6.This cc cream is designed to have good staying power, maintaining its coverage and finish throughout the day, reducing the need for frequent touch-ups. 7.Contains SPF to help protect your skin from sun damage and premature aging caused by sun exposure. Specification Net Weight : 45ml Shelf life : 3 years Type : Color correcting cc cream Colors : 2 Colors For Choose Suitable for skin types: Various skin types Package Included 1 * Color Correcting CC Cream

specification.value: Color Correction, Moisturizing, Long-wearing, Natural Coverage, Sun Protection, Nourishing
#38,437 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #30 in CC Facial Creams

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the CC cream effective and easy to apply, appreciating its lightweight feel and smooth application. The product receives positive feedback for its quality, with one customer describing it as a "magic eraser for their face." The skin color match and coverage receive mixed reviews - while some say it matches their skin tone perfectly and provides great coverage, others find it doesn't match their skin tone and provides insufficient coverage. The moisturizing effects and texture also get mixed reactions, with some saying it gives a natural glow while others note it can make skin look older and cakey, and while some find it smooth, others describe it as very thin.

reviews.reviewText: Very please to note that this product really matches my skin tone perfectly. Using as a spf and primer, Does leave skin a little shiny. Used a light dusting of a translucent powder to take the shine down. No irritation or breakouts. Leaves skin nice and soft.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Excellent product. I purchased the dark shade, it seamlessly blends into medium to dark skin tones flawlessly. I will definitely purchase it again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: My 55 year old skin loves this and I continue to buy it when needed. It’s super soft and light and keeps my skin balanced and even and its skin care and SPF in one.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 23, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This definitely blends with my skin color. Not a lot of coverage but it’s moisturizing while giving a slight amount of color
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 9, 2025

reviews.reviewText: It worked well and did everything it said it would except for the fact that I have sensitive skin and I was allergic. It is moisturizing and light weight but if you have sensitive skin I would not buy it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 20, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I bought this in February and used it ones. I tried to wear it yesterday and when I squeezed the tube to get product, bubbles and water came out of the nozzle. I then shook it to see if it just needed mixing , but that didnt work and clear liquid just continued to come out the tube each time I squeezed it. What a waste of money down the drain. DON'T BOTHER..it's not WORTH IT!!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 20, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I am older, this really is nice, just a little goes a long way, great coverage
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026
